languages.text: {n}Из вокс-решетки вырывается насмешливая трель.{/n} "Мне стоило сразу догадаться, Диодас слишком много знал и был чрезмерно уверен в своем превосходстве. Ювенна всегда была амбициозна, как и ее мать. Пожалуй... это многое проясняет. То, что я счел за некомпетентность, оказалось изменой. Как тривиально, Ювенна..."

{n}A mocking trill emanates from the vox-grille.{/n} "I should have realised at once. Diodas knew too much and was overly confident in his superiority. Juvenna was always ambitious, as was her mother. This... clarifies a great deal. What I mistook for incompetence was betrayal. How vulgar, Juvenna..."
languages.original_text: {n}Из вокс-решетки вырывается насмешливая трель.{/n} "Мне стоило сразу догадаться, Диодас слишком много знал и был чрезмерно уверен в своем превосходстве. Ювенна всегда была амбициозна, как и ее мать. Пожалуй... это многое проясняет. То, что я счел за некомпетентность, оказалось изменой. Как тривиально, Ювенна..."

Juvenna was always ambitious, as was her mother. This... clarifies a great deal. What I mistook for incompetence was betrayal. How vulgar, Juvenna..."

Juvenna was always ambitious, as was her mother. This... clarifies a great deal. What I mistook for incompetence was betrayal. How vulgar, Juvenna..."

{n}A mocking trill emanates from the vox-grille.{/n} "I should have realised at once. Diodas knew too much and was overly confident in his superiority. Juvenna was always ambitious, as was her mother. This... clarifies a great deal. What I mistook for incompetence was betrayal. How vulgar, Juvenna..."

languages.text: {n}Ein spöttisches Trillern ertönt aus dem Vox-Gitter.{/n} "Ich hätte es sofort erkennen müssen. Diodas wusste zu viel und war in seiner Überlegenheit zu selbstsicher. Juvenna war schon immer ehrgeizig, genau wie ihre Mutter. Das ... erklärt einiges. Was ich fälschlicherweise für Inkompetenz hielt, war Verrat. Wie vulgär, Juvenna ..."
languages.original_text: {n}A mocking trill emanates from the vox-grille.{/n} "I should have realised at once. Diodas knew too much and was overly confident in his superiority. Juvenna was always ambitious, as was her mother. This... clarifies a great deal. What I mistook for incompetence was betrayal. How vulgar, Juvenna..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Ein spöttisches Trillern ertönt aus dem Vox-Gitter.{/n} "Ich hätte es sofort erkennen müssen. Diodas wusste zu viel und war in seiner Überlegenheit zu selbstsicher. Juvenna war schon immer ehrgeizig, genau wie ihre Mutter. Das ... erklärt einiges. Was ich fälschlicherweise für Inkompetenz hielt, war Verrat. Wie vulgär, Juvenna ..."

languages.text: {n}Un trille moqueur émane de la grille-vox.{/n} « J'aurais dû m'en rendre compte. Diodas en savait trop et se montrait bien trop sûr de sa supériorité. Juvenna a toujours été ambitieuse, comme sa mère. Voilà qui... clarifie bien des choses. Ce que j'ai pris pour de l'incompétence n'était finalement qu'une simple trahison. Quoi de plus ordinaire, Juvenna... »
languages.original_text: {n}A mocking trill emanates from the vox-grille.{/n} "I should have realised at once. Diodas knew too much and was overly confident in his superiority. Juvenna was always ambitious, as was her mother. This... clarifies a great deal. What I mistook for incompetence was betrayal. How vulgar, Juvenna..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Un trille moqueur émane de la grille-vox.{/n} « J'aurais dû m'en rendre compte. Diodas en savait trop et se montrait bien trop sûr de sa supériorité. Juvenna a toujours été ambitieuse, comme sa mère. Voilà qui... clarifie bien des choses. Ce que j'ai pris pour de l'incompétence n'était finalement qu'une simple trahison. Quoi de plus ordinaire, Juvenna... »

languages.text: {n}Un trino burlón brota de la rejilla del voco.{/n} «Tendría que haberme dado cuenta al momento. Diodas sabía demasiado, confiaba mucho en su superioridad. Juvenna siempre había sido ambiciosa, al igual que su madre. Esto... explica muchas cosas. Lo que había tomado por incompetencia resulta ser una traición. Qué vulgaridad, Juvenna».
languages.original_text: {n}A mocking trill emanates from the vox-grille.{/n} "I should have realised at once. Diodas knew too much and was overly confident in his superiority. Juvenna was always ambitious, as was her mother. This... clarifies a great deal. What I mistook for incompetence was betrayal. How vulgar, Juvenna..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Un trino burlón brota de la rejilla del voco.{/n} «Tendría que haberme dado cuenta al momento. Diodas sabía demasiado, confiaba mucho en su superioridad. Juvenna siempre había sido ambiciosa, al igual que su madre. Esto... explica muchas cosas. Lo que había tomado por incompetencia resulta ser una traición. Qué vulgaridad, Juvenna».

languages.text: {n}Voks ızgarasından alaycı bir ses duyuluyor.{/n} "Anlamam gerekirdi. Diodas çok şey biliyordu, üstünlüğünden aşırı emindi. Juvenna, annesi gibi hırslıydı. Bu... Pek çok şeyi açıklığa kavuşturuyor. Benim beceriksizlik sandığım şey meğer ihanetmiş. Ne de sıradan Juvenna..."
languages.original_text: {n}A mocking trill emanates from the vox-grille.{/n} "I should have realised at once. Diodas knew too much and was overly confident in his superiority. Juvenna was always ambitious, as was her mother. This... clarifies a great deal. What I mistook for incompetence was betrayal. How vulgar, Juvenna..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Voks ızgarasından alaycı bir ses duyuluyor.{/n} "Anlamam gerekirdi. Diodas çok şey biliyordu, üstünlüğünden aşırı emindi. Juvenna, annesi gibi hırslıydı. Bu... Pek çok şeyi açıklığa kavuşturuyor. Benim beceriksizlik sandığım şey meğer ihanetmiş. Ne de sıradan Juvenna..."

languages.text: {n}音阵格栅传出一声嘲弄的颤音。{/n}“我本该立刻就觉察到的。狄奥达斯知道得太多了，而且对自己的优势过于自负。尤文娜向来野心勃勃，就像她母亲一样。这下……很多事情都说得通了。我还以为是她无能，原来是背叛。真是卑鄙，尤文娜……”
languages.original_text: {n}A mocking trill emanates from the vox-grille.{/n} "I should have realised at once. Diodas knew too much and was overly confident in his superiority. Juvenna was always ambitious, as was her mother. This... clarifies a great deal. What I mistook for incompetence was betrayal. How vulgar, Juvenna..."

languages.text: {n}ヴォックス・グリルの隙間から、嘲笑の様な高音の音が漏れる。{/n}「すぐに気づけばよかった。ディオダスは知恵がありすぎた。そして、自分の優位性を過信していた。ユベナはいつも野心家だった。母もそうだった。この...事は、多くの事を明らかにする。私が無能だと勘違いしていたのは、裏切りだった。ユベナ、実に下品な行為だ...」
languages.original_text: {n}A mocking trill emanates from the vox-grille.{/n} "I should have realised at once. Diodas knew too much and was overly confident in his superiority. Juvenna was always ambitious, as was her mother. This... clarifies a great deal. What I mistook for incompetence was betrayal. How vulgar, Juvenna..."
